final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [7:0] D,
    output reg [7:0] Q,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CLK
);
    reg [7:0] memory; // 8-bit memory cell

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (WE) begin memory <= D ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(posedge CLK) begin
  Q <= memory ;
  end
endmodule
